name: Epinephrine (Adrenaline)
description: Catecholamine endogenous leh alfa iyo beta adrenergic dhaqdhaqaaqa. Daawaynta safka koowaad ee anaphylaxis iyo xiritaanka wadnaha. Anaphylaxis-ka, bawdada IM ayaa laga door bidaa IV (ammaan, waxtar u dhigma). Ha dib u dhigin gelitaanka IV ee anaphylaxis.
indications: Wadnaha oo istaaga -- garaaca wadnaha VF/VT/PEA/asystole
dose: Anaphylaxis: 0.3-0.5 mg IM (bowdada xagasha) | Isku-durista tooska ah 0.3 mg IM. Ku celi q5-15 daqiiqo PRN. Xiritaanka wadnaha: 1 mg IV/IO q3-5 min inta lagu jiro CPR. Bronchospasm daran: 0.3 mg IM.
window: Marka lagu jiro anaphylaxis: sii IM isla markiiba -- ha dib u dhigin gelitaanka faleebbaha.
contraindications: Ma jiraan wax liddi ku ah xaalad degdeg ah oo nafta halis gelinaysa
warnings: IV epinephrine ee anaphylaxis waa in kaliya loo isticmaalo xiritaanka wadnaha ama shoog qotodheer - khatar ah haddii IV lagu riixo bukaan miyir qaba.
Extravasation-ku wuxuu keenaa necrosis unug --hubi patency IV.
Waxay kordhisaa baahida ogsijiinta myocardial -- ka taxaddar cudurka wadnaha ee la yaqaan ee xiritaanka dibadda ah.

pediatric.dose: Anaphylaxis: 0.01 mg/kg IM (ugu badnaan 0.5 mg). EpiPen Jr (0.15 mg) 15-30 kg. Xiritaanka wadnaha: 0.01 mg/kg IV/IO q3-5 min.
pediatric.note: Isticmaal qiyaasta miisaanka ku salaysan. Tixraaca cajaladda Broselow ayaa lagula taliyay.

obstetric.note: Isticmaal qiyaasta anaphylaxis-ka caadiga ah - badbaadada hooyadu waa muhiim. Epinephrine waxay badbaado u tahay uurka xaaladaha degdegga ah ee nafta halis gelinaya.
